interfaces.name: getUserDashboardSummary
interfaces.description: Get a high-level summary for the home/dashboard page, including quick links and counts for reading lists, dataset cart, citation exports, collections, bookmarks, alerts, and planner.

interfaces.name: globalPublicationSearchPreview
interfaces.description: Run a lightweight global publication search from the home page search bar and return the first few matching items.

interfaces.name: getPublicationFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for the publications search & results page (publication types, years range, languages, access types, statuses, etc.).

interfaces.name: searchPublications
interfaces.description: Search publications with keyword, filters, and sorting for the publications search & results page.

interfaces.name: getPublicationDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific publication to display on the publication detail page.

interfaces.name: createReadingList
interfaces.description: Create a new reading list (e.g., 'Crypto Fraud 2024').

interfaces.name: getReadingListsSummary
interfaces.description: Get a list of all reading lists with item counts for selection dialogs and the reading lists page.

interfaces.name: addPublicationToReadingList
interfaces.description: Add a publication to an existing reading list. Handles creation of the list item and returns updated list info.

interfaces.name: getReadingListDetail
interfaces.description: Get details for a specific reading list, including contained publications, for the reading list page.

interfaces.name: removeReadingListItem
interfaces.description: Remove a single publication from a reading list.

interfaces.name: reorderReadingListItems
interfaces.description: Update the order of items in a reading list.

interfaces.name: renameReadingList
interfaces.description: Rename an existing reading list.

interfaces.name: deleteReadingList
interfaces.description: Delete a reading list and all its items.

interfaces.name: createArticleCollection
interfaces.description: Create a new article collection (e.g., 'FS Fraud Detection 2018–2023').

interfaces.name: getArticleCollectionsSummary
interfaces.description: Get a list of all article collections with item counts for selection dialogs and the collections page.

interfaces.name: addPublicationToCollection
interfaces.description: Add a publication to an existing article collection.

interfaces.name: getArticleCollectionDetail
interfaces.description: Get details for a specific article collection, including contained publications.

interfaces.name: removeArticleFromCollection
interfaces.description: Remove a publication from an article collection.

interfaces.name: reorderArticleCollectionItems
interfaces.description: Update the order of items in an article collection.

interfaces.name: getFormattedCitation
interfaces.description: Generate a formatted citation for a publication in a given style (e.g., APA) for display, copy, or download.

interfaces.name: createCitationExportList
interfaces.description: Create a new citation export list (e.g., 'Tax Evasion Assignment').

interfaces.name: getCitationExportListsSummary
interfaces.description: Get a list of all citation export lists with citation counts for the citation lists page and selection dialogs.

interfaces.name: addCitationToExportList
interfaces.description: Add a publication's citation in the specified style to an existing citation export list.

interfaces.name: getCitationExportListDetail
interfaces.description: Get details for a specific citation export list, including formatted citations.

interfaces.name: renameCitationExportList
interfaces.description: Rename an existing citation export list.

interfaces.name: deleteCitationExportList
interfaces.description: Delete a citation export list and its items.

interfaces.name: removeCitationExportItem
interfaces.description: Remove a single citation from a citation export list.

interfaces.name: exportCitationExportList
interfaces.description: Export all citations in a citation export list in a specified export format (e.g., RIS, BibTeX, plain text).

interfaces.name: createBookmark
interfaces.description: Bookmark a publication and optionally add tags and a note (e.g., tag 'case study' for a retracted LIBOR article).

interfaces.name: getBookmarks
interfaces.description: List all bookmarks with optional filtering by tag, keyword, or publication type for the bookmarks page.

interfaces.name: updateBookmark
interfaces.description: Update tags or note for an existing bookmark.

interfaces.name: deleteBookmark
interfaces.description: Remove a bookmark.

interfaces.name: createSavedSearchAlert
interfaces.description: Create a saved search alert (e.g., 'Ponzi Schemes 2010+') based on the current publications search query, filters, and sort.

interfaces.name: getSavedSearchAlertsSummary
interfaces.description: List all saved searches/alerts with summary of filters and last run date for the alerts & saved searches page.

interfaces.name: updateSavedSearchAlertSettings
interfaces.description: Edit basic settings of a saved search alert, including name, notification type, and frequency, and enabling/disabling it.

interfaces.name: deleteSavedSearchAlert
interfaces.description: Delete a saved search alert.

interfaces.name: runSavedSearchAlert
interfaces.description: Manually run a saved search alert and return the latest matching results.

interfaces.name: getDatasetFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for the datasets search & results page.

interfaces.name: searchDatasets
interfaces.description: Search datasets by keyword, filters, and sorting for the datasets search & results page.

interfaces.name: getDatasetDetail
interfaces.description: Get full metadata for a dataset to display on the dataset detail page.

interfaces.name: getDatasetCart
interfaces.description: Get the current dataset cart, including cart metadata and items with key dataset fields.

interfaces.name: addDatasetToCart
interfaces.description: Add a dataset to the dataset cart, creating the cart if it does not exist.

interfaces.name: removeDatasetFromCart
interfaces.description: Remove a single dataset from the dataset cart.

interfaces.name: clearDatasetCart
interfaces.description: Remove all datasets from the dataset cart.

interfaces.name: initiateDatasetCartDownload
interfaces.description: Initiate the download or request process for all datasets in the cart. Returns any required agreements and per-dataset access URLs or instructions.

interfaces.name: getAuthorFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for the authors search & results page (topics, regions, institutions).

interfaces.name: searchAuthors
interfaces.description: Search authors by name or topic with filters and sorting for the authors search & results page.

interfaces.name: getAuthorProfile
interfaces.description: Get a full author profile, including biography, metrics, and list of publications, for the author profile page.

interfaces.name: followAuthor
interfaces.description: Follow an author to track their new work.

interfaces.name: unfollowAuthor
interfaces.description: Unfollow an author.

interfaces.name: getFollowedAuthorsSummary
interfaces.description: Get a list of all authors currently followed by the user.

interfaces.name: getEventFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for the events & conferences search page (regions, date ranges presets, fee ranges).

interfaces.name: searchEvents
interfaces.description: Search events and conferences by keyword, filters, and sorting for the events search & results page.

interfaces.name: getEventDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for an event to display on the event detail page.

interfaces.name: addEventToPlanner
interfaces.description: Add an event to the user's planner (e.g., Save to My Events). Creates a planner entry with status 'planned'.

interfaces.name: getPlannerEntries
interfaces.description: Get all planner entries, including associated event details, for the event planner page (list or calendar view).

interfaces.name: updatePlannerEntryStatus
interfaces.description: Update the status of a planner entry (e.g., planned, registered, attended, cancelled).

interfaces.name: removePlannerEntry
interfaces.description: Remove an event from the planner.

interfaces.name: getAboutContent
interfaces.description: Get the content for the About page, including purpose, scope, data sources, and credits.

interfaces.name: getHelpTopicsSummary
interfaces.description: Get a list of help topics and FAQs for the Help & FAQ page.

interfaces.name: getHelpTopicDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed help content for a specific topic, including step-by-step guidance and FAQs.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateDatasetCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create the single dataset cart for the current user.

helperFunctions.name: _persistUserListsState
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to persist changes to user-specific structures such as reading lists, collections, bookmarks, citation export lists, alerts, and planner entries.

helperFunctions.name: _runSavedSearchQuery
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to execute a SavedSearchAlert configuration and return raw search results across the configured scope.
